name: HHV6_telomere_integration
description: Chromosomally integrated HHV-6 (ciHHV-6): germline-transmissible integration of HHV-6A or HHV-6B into the subtelomeric region of a host chromosome via homologous recombination between the viral DR telomeric repeats and host TTAGGG telomere. Carrier prevalence ~1% in northern European populations. Integration sites identified at chromosomes 9q, 10q, 11p, 17p, 18q, 19q, 22q (and others). Carriers have HHV-6 DNA at one TTAGGG-end of one chromosome and produce one extra integrated copy per nucleated cell, complicating viral-load PCR. Reactivation from integrated state has been documented and may have clinical consequences.
expected_copy_count: 1 integrated copy per cell in ciHHV-6 carriers; ~1% of population
